# tfe_stack_variable_set

Manages associations between variable sets and stacks.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `stack_id` (String) The ID of the stack.
- `variable_set_id` (String) The ID of the variable set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the stack variable set association.
